name: Saved items count is displayed on the saved page
scenarioId: saved_wishlist:Saved items count is displayed on the saved page
methodName: Saved items count is displayed on the saved page

testSteps.description: Given the shopper is on the homepage with save buttons visible

children.description: Shopper opens the browser at http://localhost:3001

testSteps.description: And the shopper has saved the first product
When the shopper navigates to the saved page

children.description: Shopper opens the browser at http://localhost:3001/saved

testSteps.description: Then the saved count should be visible and show a number

userStory.narrative:
As an online shopper on Linea Supply
  I want to save products I am interested in
  So that I can find them easily later

title: Saved items count is displayed on the saved page
